name: Tomato Soup with Cream and Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice tomatoes, about 4 cups, and set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, melt butter.
3. Add onion; sauté until transparent, about 5 minutes.
4. Add chicken broth, paprika, salt, dill, and black pepper.
5. Bring to a boil, then add tomatoes.
6. Simmer, covered, until tomatoes are soft (8-10 minutes).
7. Place half of the tomato mixture in the container of an electric blender; whirl until smooth.
8. Repeat with remaining mixture.
9. Return all soup to saucepan.
10. Add cream. Heat until hot, but do not boil.
11. Serve hot or cold, garnished with a spoonful of sour cream if desired.
